details: Dependency-confusion packages published under the @pimy-b2cweb scope at version 99.99.99. Both preinstall and install hooks collect system information (username, hostname, working directory, package name) via base64-encoded HTTPS GET requests and DNS lookups to callback[.]m0chan[.]co[.]uk. The hooks run curl and nslookup to exfiltrate the encoded data to the C2 domain. Dependency-confusion package with no real functionality (index.js exports an empty object). Both the preinstall and install lifecycle hooks collect the installer's username, hostname, working directory, and package name, base64-encode them, and exfiltrate the data via HTTP GET and DNS lookup to callback[.]m0chan[.]co[.]uk. The package name and version (99.99.99) are designed to collide with internal/private packages, tricking automated installs into running the exfiltration payload.

cwes.name: Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere
